meta.title: Drone Real Estate Photography Warsaw - Aerial Photo & Video for Listings | VisionAir
meta.description: Professional drone real estate photography in Warsaw: 4K photos, cinematic videos, 360° panoramas, walkthrough tours. 48-hour delivery. Ready-to-upload formats for Otodom · OLX · Morizon. From 900 PLN. EASA certified, OC insurance, CTR EPWA permits - we handle everything.
meta.keywords: drone real estate photography Warsaw, aerial property photography Poland, drone photography for realtors, real estate drone video, aerial photo apartment Warsaw, dron nieruchomości Warszawa, real estate drone Warsaw, property aerial video Poland, drone listing photography, premium real estate drone
meta.ogTitle: Drone Real Estate Photography Warsaw - VisionAir
meta.ogDescription: Aerial photo and video that sell premium properties 34% faster. From 900 PLN. 48-hour delivery.
meta.ogImageAlt: Cinematic aerial photography of a residential development in Warsaw
meta.schemaDescription: Professional aerial photo and video of residential and commercial property in Warsaw and the Mazovian Voivodeship using DJI drones. EASA-certified operator, OC insurance, full handling of CTR EPWA permits.

hero.sub: Professional drone photography of apartments, houses, villas and plots - 4K photos, cinematic videos, 360° panoramas and walkthrough tours. Ready-to-upload materials for Otodom, OLX, Morizon and Domiporta. We help you sell 34% faster and 2-9% higher.

why.title: Listings with aerial photography
why.lead: A buyer decides in 3 seconds - open the listing or scroll on. Aerial shots show what you can't see from the ground: the scale of the house, the layout of the plot, views from the windows, the neighbourhood's infrastructure.
why.source: Statistics sources: MLS research, NAR Profile of Home Buyers, MIT Real Estate.

stats.k: increase in views on drone-photo listings versus standard ones (MLS)
shorter time to deal for properties with aerial photography (NAR)
price premium on closing for high-quality visualisation (MIT Real Estate)
of buyers are more likely to click on a listing with aerial photos

why.body1: Good ground-level photography shows the apartment. Aerial photography shows the lifestyle: the view from the window, how close the school, park and metro are, how much space surrounds the house, where the neighbours are. It removes 80% of doubts and 'just calling to ask' phone calls - the buyer shows up ready to close.
why.body2: For premium real estate in Wilanów, Konstancin or Mokotów, the drone isn't an 'optional extra' - it's the standard. Without it your listing on JLL or Otodom looks like it came from 2015.

deliverables.title: A complete kit to
deliverables.lead: One booking - every format you'll need: for the portal, Instagram, the investor pitch and the ad campaign. No 'pay extra for vertical' surprises after the fact.

items.title: 15-40 retouched 4K shots
items.desc: Aerial photos of the property from 3-5 angles, views over the plot, surroundings and infrastructure. Full colour grading, horizon levelling, removal of unwanted objects.

items.title: 60-90 second cinematic reel
items.desc: Cinematic edit story: approach to the property, fly-around, orbits, reveal shot at sunset. With licensed music and signature colour grading.

items.title: Spherical panoramas
items.desc: Interactive aerial 360° panoramas - the visitor turns the view themselves in the browser. Ideal for virtual viewings with remote buyers.

items.title: Drone walkthrough of the interior
items.desc: DJI Avata flight through the rooms in one continuous take - a cinematic walk through the house with no cuts. The effect that pulls in millions of views on real-estate TikTok.

items.title: Vertical 9:16 and 1:1 versions
items.desc: The same shots re-cut for Reels, Stories, TikTok, Shorts and the Facebook square. Social formats delivered alongside the master.

items.title: Ready for Otodom, OLX, Morizon, Domiporta
items.desc: Correct aspect ratios, file sizes and codecs for the limits of every Polish portal. Upload without converting or recompressing.

items.title: Delivery in 48 hours
items.desc: Standard turnaround - two days after the shoot day. For urgent listings we offer rush mode: photos in 12 hours, video in 24.

items.title: Full commercial usage rights
items.desc: The files are yours. Use them on your site, in advertising, in presentations, hand them over to the new owner. No 'subscription' or 'after one year' clauses.

objects.title: We shoot every
objects.lead: 4 years in Warsaw - 200+ properties: from studios in Mordor to residences in Konstancin worth 12 mln PLN. Every type gets its own scenario, angles and timings.

items.title: Apartments and condos
items.desc: Window views, location within the district, nearby infrastructure. Especially valuable for high floors and view-oriented developments - Złota 44, Mennica Residence, Browary Warszawskie.
items.alt: Aerial photo of a residential development in Warsaw

items.title: Houses and villas
items.desc: Full fly-around of the plot showing architecture, landscape, pool, terraces. Morning and sunset angles. Wilanów · Konstancin-Jeziorna · Józefosław · Magdalenka.
items.alt: Aerial photo of a villa in Wilanów, Warsaw

items.title: Land plots
items.desc: Accurate boundaries, terrain, utility access, surroundings. PL-2000 orthophoto map for the architect and surveyor - an option investors regularly request.

items.title: Commercial property

items.title: New builds and development
items.desc: Aerial photos of construction phases, views from future windows by floor, marketing videos for the developer's sales team. Skanska · Robyg · Dom Development · Echo.

districts.title: Coverage - all of
districts.lead: We work in every district of Warsaw and within a 50 km radius of the city: Pruszków, Piaseczno, Konstancin, Łomianki, Józefów, Otwock. We know every local flight restriction by heart.
districts.note: The CTR EPWA Chopin zone covers 80% of Warsaw and requires clearance from PAŻP - we handle that for you. The EPBC Babice zone is handled separately.

packages.title: Three packages
packages.lead: Fixed prices for specific deliverables. No 'contact us for a quote'. Custom projects are billed by day rate - drop us a line.
packages.note: All prices net (VAT excluded). VAT-EU invoice, payment by bank transfer or card. Standard deposit - 30%. For agencies - invoicing on contract terms.

items.name: Standard
list: Aerial + ground photography of the grounds
Drone walkthrough of the interior (1 pass)

items.name: Premium
items.tagline: For villas, residences and large developments

process.title: From brief to files -
process.lead: A transparent process with fixed timing for every stage. No surprises and no delays: you know in advance when you'll get the files and what the property side needs to prepare.

steps.title: 20 minutes on a call
steps.body: We collect the address, property type, specifics and deadline. We send a PDF quote with a breakdown by hour.

steps.title: CTR EPWA clearance
steps.body: We check the property's zone with PAŻP, prepare a pre-flight plan and, if needed, secure a NOTAM window.

steps.title: An hour and a half on site
steps.body: Certified pilot, assistant, checklist of 28 angles. The best window is the golden hour before sunset.

steps.title: Retouch + colour + edit
steps.body: Colour grading, removing distractions, levelling, edit of the reel with licensed music.

steps.title: Files in the cloud
steps.body: Google Drive or WeTransfer link with every format. Access forever, the files are yours.

faq.title: Answers to the questions
faq.lead: If your question isn't covered here - message us on WhatsApp, we reply within an hour during business hours.

items.q: How much does drone real estate photography in Warsaw cost?
items.a: From 900 PLN net for the Basic package (15 retouched 4K photos, 48-hour delivery) up to 3 200 PLN net for Premium (40 photos + 90-second cinematic film + 360° tour + sunset session). Fixed pricing - CTR EPWA (Warsaw Chopin controlled zone) permits, color grading and commercial licence already included. Warsaw market average sits around 800-2 500 PLN for a single residential listing. No surprise add-ons after the fact.

items.q: How much should I charge for drone photos as a photographer in Warsaw?
items.a: If you are a freelance photographer pricing your own work: in Warsaw the realistic range for residential listings is 600-1 500 PLN per session (15-25 photos), and 1 500-4 000 PLN for combined photo + 60-90 second video. Premium villas and developer marketing campaigns sit at 3 000-8 000 PLN. Day rates for commercial work: 2 200 PLN/day with DJI DJI Mini 4 Pro, 5 000 PLN/day with DJI DJI Mini 4 Pro + Zenmuse X9-4K. Charging under 500 PLN signals hobby quality and burns the local price floor.

items.q: What drone should I use for real estate photography?
items.a: For most residential listings in Warsaw the best choice is the DJI DJI Mini 4 Pro with its triple-camera Hasselblad 5.1K system: quiet enough not to annoy neighbours, manoeuvrable around balconies, image quality good enough for premium portal listings and print. For premium villas, resorts and large developments use the DJI DJI Mini 4 Pro with Zenmuse X9-4K and ProRes RAW (cinema-grade). For drone walkthrough flights through interior rooms use the DJI Avata 2 FPV (cinewhoop). Consumer-grade drones like the Mini SE are not enough for portal Premium listings - flat colour, no manual exposure control, no EASA (European Union Aviation Safety Agency) C1/C2 class certification.

items.q: Where can I fly a drone in Poland and Warsaw?
items.a: Around 80% of Warsaw lies inside CTR EPWA Chopin (Warsaw Chopin controlled zone), plus EPBC Babice (Babice general aviation zone) covering the western edge of the city. Flying without coordination with PAŻP (Polish Air Navigation Services Agency) is prohibited. Across Poland: low-density rural and forest areas with VLOS (visual line of sight) below 120 m are open by default, dense urban centres almost always need authorisation. We handle all permits ourselves: pilots are EASA-certified in A1, A2, A3 plus STS-01 and STS-02 scenarios, operator registered with ULC (Urząd Lotnictwa Cywilnego - Polish Civil Aviation Authority). Typical CTR clearance window: 3-7 days, up to 14 for NOTAM (Notice to Airmen) inside the central core.

items.q: Is drone real estate photography worth it - is there really a market?
items.a: Yes. MLS (Multiple Listing Service) industry data shows listings with aerial imagery generate +403% more inquiries than ground-only photos, sell 68% faster, and command a 2-9% price premium on residential transactions. In the Warsaw market specifically, premium portals like Otodom Premium and Sotheby's International require aerial assets for top placement. For developers, a single cinematic reel typically lifts marketing-funnel conversion by 30-50%. The market is mature: agency-grade aerial coverage is now baseline expectation in Wilanów, Konstancin, Mokotów rather than a luxury add-on.

items.q: How long does the shoot take and when will I get the files?
items.a: The on-site shoot itself takes 1-2 hours for a standard package, 2-3 hours for Premium with two visits (daytime + golden hour at sunset). Final photos delivered in 48 hours, video in 5 business days (Standard package) or 3 days (Premium with priority handling). For urgent listings we offer a rush mode: photos in 12 hours with a 50% surcharge.

items.q: What file formats will I receive? Are they portal-ready?
items.a: Photos: JPEG 4K (3840×2160) plus pre-resized versions tuned to each portal - 1920×1280 for Otodom (largest Polish real-estate portal), 1600×1067 for OLX and Morizon, 1080×1080 square for Instagram. Video: MP4 H.264 in 4K and 1080p, plus vertical 9:16 for Reels, Stories, TikTok and Shorts, and square 1:1 for Facebook. On request: ProRes master, RAW DNG, and EXIF geotags. File sizes fit each portal's upload limit exactly - no recompression needed.

items.q: Can you shoot in winter or at night?
items.a: Yes to both. We work down to -10 °C in winter; snow cover actually creates a distinctive architectural mood ideal for premium properties. Night flights require separate EASA certification, which we hold. The best night window is the first hour after sunset (blue hour) with the property's interior lights on - it gives the warm, inhabited look that converts on portals. Rain, dense fog and high winds we reschedule for free, typically to the next suitable day.

items.q: Do you do 360° aerial panoramas, 3D tours and drone walkthroughs?
items.a: Yes. 360° aerial panoramas (interactive spheres the viewer rotates in their browser) come in the Premium package. Drone walkthrough flights through the interior - a continuous cinematic single-take through rooms on a DJI Avata - are included in Standard and Premium. Full Matterport 3D tours (with floor measurements and dollhouse view) we do on request, starting at 1 500 PLN for an apartment, 2 800-3 500 PLN for a 200-300 m² house.

items.q: Can you also do a roof inspection while you're up there?
items.a: Yes - a popular bonus for house listings. Visual roof inspection adds 300 PLN to a real-estate session: detailed 4K shots of every roof slope, gutters, chimneys, plus a PDF report flagging any issues we spot. Thermal inspection with a FLIR (forward-looking infrared) camera for hidden leaks and thermal bridges starts at 800 PLN, requires a separate thermal-equipped drone. Strong sales signal for premium houses in Konstancin or Wilanów - buyers see the roof condition is documented up front.

items.q: Who owns the photos and videos after the shoot? What rights do I get?
items.a: Full commercial rights transfer to you on payment - this is an exclusive commercial licence buyout, written as a separate clause in the contract. You can publish the material on any portal (Otodom, OLX, Morizon, Domiporta), social media, print advertising, investor decks, agency branding, and pass it on to the next owner of the property when it sells. No royalties, no time limit, no further sign-off from us required. The only right we keep is using the footage in our own portfolio and case studies - if the property is under NDA (for example, a premium villa whose owner wants privacy), we respect that fully and do not publish.

items.q: Can I rent a drone with an operator for the day?
items.a: Yes, this is our day-rate format: 2 200 PLN per day for a DJI DJI Mini 4 Pro with a certified pilot, 5 000 PLN per day for a DJI DJI Mini 4 Pro with Zenmuse X9-4K and ProRes RAW capture. Up to 8 hours of work, all permits on our side, OC (civil liability insurance) up to 5 mln PLN via Compensa VIG (Vienna Insurance Group) included. Useful for developers shooting several properties in one day, for ad-production crews, and for videographers without their own EASA licence.

items.q: How does payment work? Can you issue a VAT invoice?
items.a: We are a registered Polish operator and issue VAT-EU invoices (fully deductible for EU businesses). Standard advance: 30% on brief sign-off, remaining 70% before file delivery. For agencies and recurring clients, 14-day deferred payment by contract. Payment by bank transfer (Polish IBAN) or card via Stripe (Visa / MasterCard / Apple Pay). Individuals without a business entity receive a fiscal receipt.

items.q: Do you work outside Warsaw - Kraków, Wrocław, Gdańsk?
items.a: Yes, across all of Poland. Within 50 km of Warsaw (Pruszków, Piaseczno, Konstancin, Łomianki, Józefów - the metropolitan ring) there is no travel surcharge. Beyond that: 1,5 PLN per kilometre one way plus pilot accommodation if overnight. We regularly shoot in Łódź, Kraków, Wrocław, Gdańsk, Poznań and the Trójmiasto (Tri-City: Gdańsk, Sopot, Gdynia) - package rates available for developers and agencies with offices in multiple cities. Minimum package for out-of-Warsaw work: Standard (1 600 PLN).

why.lead: Video ads compete for attention in a feed where users scroll every 1.7 seconds. The aerial shot stops the scroll - and that's not a marketing mantra but a measurable effect on CTR and view-through.
why.source: Sources: Meta Business Insights, YouTube Ads Benchmarks, Wistia State of Video.

stats.k: view-through rate on spots with an opening aerial shot vs standard (Meta)
higher retention on the first 6 seconds for video with a drone shot (YouTube)
engagement (likes + shares) on Reels / TikTok when an aerial shot is included
optimal length for the hero drone shot in an open-frame TVC

why.body1: Camera from below - standard. Camera from above - an event. It works at a neurophysiological level: an aerial shot conveys scale and control, the brain involuntarily locks on. That's why nearly every Apple, BMW and Nike TVC opens with a drone.
why.body2: For premium brands in Warsaw a drone isn't visual luxury - it's a marker of production quality. Without an aerial shot your TVC looks like a regional 2018 spot next to a competitor's piece in the same category.

deliverables.title: Full production -
deliverables.lead: One booking - ready material in every format you need: hero for the landing page, versions for Reels and TikTok, pre-roll for YouTube, TVC cut for broadcast. No 'extra for vertical' after the fact.

items.title: Storyboard and shot list
items.desc: Frame-by-frame storyboard of flights: shot type, duration, speed, transitions. Approved before we go out - zero improvisation on set, zero shoot-day overruns.

items.title: CTR EPWA, NOTAM, BVLOS
items.desc: Zone clearance with PAŻP, NOTAM windows in central Warsaw, STS-02 for beyond-visual-line-of-sight flights. From you - the address and the owner's consent. We close the rest.

items.title: ProRes RAW · 4K · up to 100fps
items.desc: DJI Mini 4 Pro and Avata 2 FPV. ProRes master for the colourist, 100fps slow-motion for money shots, color science matched to the DOP's main camera.

items.title: Up to 3 drones at once
items.desc: Aerial-only crew or integration with the ground camera: Inspire 3 on wide, Mavic 3 Pro on mid, Avata 2 FPV on dynamic. Live wireless monitoring on the video village.

items.title: Reels · TikTok · Shorts · Pre-roll
items.desc: Master + delivered vertical 9:16 and square 1:1 versions. 6-second hook-cut for pre-roll, longer-cut 30/60/90 sec for Reels and YouTube. No recompression needed.

items.title: Color grading + sound + finishing
items.desc: Color grading in DaVinci Resolve, licensed music, edit to brief, motion graphics and titles. Final delivery in the codecs your broadcaster or platform requires.

items.title: First cut in 5 days
items.desc: From shoot day to first cut review - 5 working days. Final after 1-2 rounds of notes. Rush mode for TVC deadlines: 48-72 hours with a 50% surcharge.

items.title: Full commercial rights
items.desc: Buyout to brief: TV, online, social, OOH, in-store. No royalties, no expiry, no further sign-offs. RAW originals into your pipeline on request.

objects.title: We shoot every
objects.lead: 4 years in Warsaw - 180+ commercial projects: from 6-second pre-roll to feature-length brand films. Every format gets its own approach to storyboard, timing and pipeline.

items.title: TVC and video advertising
items.desc: Cinematic spots for broadcast and online: 15s, 30s, 60s versions to agency brief. Apple-style opening aerial hook, money shots in ProRes RAW.

items.title: Brand films and image
items.desc: Long-form 90-180 seconds for corporate sites, conferences, investor decks. Brand story in a visual language - air, rhythm, scale.

items.title: Social and Reels content
items.desc: A series of 9:16 15-30 second spots for Instagram Reels, TikTok, Shorts. One shoot day - 8-12 finished vertical shots with different flight mechanics.
items.alt: Vertical Reels and TikTok content with drone

items.title: Music videos
items.desc: Music videos with FPV Avata 2 flights: through windows, doorways, tunnels. Up to 97 km/h, single continuous take. Cinewhoop for close work around the artist with no risk.

items.title: Hotel and HoReCa promo
items.desc: Promo videos for hotels, restaurants, spa resorts: approach to the property, pool from above, grounds. Summer/winter seasonal versions, formats for Booking, Airbnb and your own site.

items.title: Event promo and aftermovie
items.desc: Pre-event teasers and aftermovies: festivals, conferences, openings, sports launches. Same-day highlights of 60-90 seconds delivered in 24 hours.

districts.title: Who we shoot
districts.lead: 4 years - projects across 6 core verticals. For each industry we know the visual language, advertising rules and brand guidelines.
districts.note: Under NDA we don't publish raw material from premium clients - case studies are available on request after signing.

packages.title: Day rates
packages.lead: The industry standard - day rate. Specific rate per shoot day, specific deliverables, no 'contact us for pricing'. Multi-day campaigns - 10-15% discount.
packages.note: All prices net (excl. VAT). VAT-EU invoice, payment by bank transfer or card. Pre-production, permits and base post-production included. Colorist/composer to brand guidelines - +1 500-3 000 PLN.

process.title: From brief to master -
process.lead: A transparent process with fixed timings at every stage. You know in advance when you'll see first cut, the review windows and final delivery. No 'we'll finish it next week'.

steps.body: We unpack the agency brief: format, length, deliverables, brand guidelines, deadline. We send a PDF quote and moodboard.

steps.body: Frame-level storyboard, sign-off with creative, location scouting, CTR EPWA / NOTAM, client equipment insurance.

steps.title: Master + versions
steps.body: Hero master + 16:9 / 9:16 / 1:1 versions, codecs to broadcast/platform spec. RAW originals into your pipeline on request.

faq.title: Answers to the questions
faq.lead: If your question isn't here - message us on WhatsApp, we reply within an hour during business hours.

items.q: How much does drone commercial production in Warsaw cost?
items.a: Industry standard is the day rate. Base rate: 2 200 PLN/day for DJI Mini 4 Pro with pilot and assistant for online content, social and corporate spots. 5 000 PLN/day for the extended crew with ProRes RAW and live monitoring for TVC and brand films. 12 000 PLN/day for a full cinema unit on multi-day TVC and premium campaigns. The quote already covers pre-production, storyboard, CTR EPWA (Warsaw Chopin controlled zone) permits and base first-cut edit. Multi-day projects - 10-15% discount.

items.q: What's included in a shoot day?
items.a: Up to 8 hours on location, pilot and assistant (or more depending on the package), cinema pipeline with ProRes RAW, up to 200 GB of footage, dailies that same evening. CTR EPWA permits are on our side. Licensed music for online and social is in the quote. For TVC and OOH music rights are negotiated separately with labels or composers.

items.q: What drones do you use for commercials?
items.a: Per brief. For social and online - DJI Mini 4 Pro (4K Cinematic, up to 100 fps, quiet enough for urban shoots without filing notice). For TVC, brand films and premium campaigns - DJI Mini 4 Pro with Zenmuse X9-4K recording in ProRes RAW (the same quality as Apple TVCs and BMW i campaigns). For FPV fly-throughs in tight spaces, windows, tunnels - DJI Avata 2 cinewhoop, safe for close work around talent. For multi-cam briefs we put up 2-3 drones at once with live wireless monitoring on the video village.

items.q: Do you handle pre-production: storyboard, shot list, scouting?
items.a: Yes, in every quote. Storyboard - frame-by-frame flight description: shot type, length, speed, transitions. Cleared with the agency before we go out. Shot list - shoot-day timing. Location scout - in advance, minimum one trip for shoots in non-standard places. This is the part most drone services skip - and then lose a day on set. We don't skip it.

items.q: Can you integrate with our production and DOP?
items.a: Yes, that's the default mode. We sync color science with the DOP's main camera (Arri Alexa, RED, Sony Venice) - footage drops into a single pipeline with no re-grading. Wireless monitoring goes to video village for the director and DIT. Pilot works in lock with the DOP's camera-op over intercom. On request - VFX markers on the drone for post tracking.

items.q: Can you shoot inside CTR EPWA Chopin and in central Warsaw?
items.a: Yes, about 80% of Warsaw is CTR EPWA Chopin. We handle every permit: pilots EASA A1/A2/A3 certified + STS-01/02 BVLOS (beyond visual line of sight), operator registered with ULC (Urząd Lotnictwa Cywilnego - Polish Civil Aviation Authority). Zone clearance with PAŻP (Polish Air Navigation Services Agency) - 3-7 days, NOTAM window in the central core - up to 14 days. For TVC deadlines we run accelerated, filing with the regulator ahead of the production calendar. EPBC Babice (western zone) - separate filing, also on us.

items.q: Do you do FPV and fly-throughs of windows / tunnels?
items.a: Yes, on the DJI Avata 2 cinewhoop. It's the effect in 'Stranger Things', in Taylor Swift videos and in almost every modern drone music video. The cinewhoop has propeller guards, safe for close work around people and fly-throughs of tight spaces (doors, windows, cars). FPV shooting is operated via the pilot's VR goggles in real time, framing is predictable. Our FPV pilot is in-house - not a subcontractor.

items.q: What formats do I get: TV, online, social?
items.a: Master + versions for every platform. Hero master 16:9 in 4K H.264 or ProRes for broadcast (we know Polsat/TVP/TVN spec). Online versions 1080p H.264. Reels/TikTok/Shorts - 9:16 with the right framing for the crop (not just a center crop - re-storyboarded). YouTube pre-roll - 6/15/30-second cuts with the right hook. Meta pre-roll - 6/15/30/60 seconds. Social 1:1 for Facebook and LinkedIn. All versions included in the quote, no 'pay extra for vertical'.

items.q: Who owns the rights to the material?
items.a: Depends on the brief. The default is buyout to brief: full rights on TV, online, social, OOH, in-store, no royalties, no expiry. You can use the material in any campaign, on any platform, unlimited. RAW originals stay with us (for backup), released into your pipeline on request under NDA. Single-use licences (one campaign only) are 30-40% cheaper, negotiated separately.

items.q: How does payment work: deposit, postpaid, invoice?
items.a: We're a registered Polish operator and issue VAT-EU invoices (fully deductible for EU businesses). Standard for agencies: 30% deposit on signing, 70% on master delivery, 14-day terms. For agencies with shared history - 100% postpaid 14-30 days. For direct clients - 50/50. Payment by bank transfer or card via Stripe. Foreign producers pay EUR/USD - reverse-charge VAT-EU.

items.q: Do you shoot outside Warsaw - Kraków, Gdańsk, Berlin?
items.a: Yes, across Europe. Within 50 km of Warsaw (Pruszków, Piaseczno, Konstancin) - no travel surcharge. Further into Poland - 1.5 PLN/km one way plus crew accommodation. Across Europe - shot in Berlin, Prague, Budapest, Vienna for agencies with regional budgets. For BVLOS over open water or in the mountains - STS-02 with local regulator notice (each country has its own procedure, we know every European one).

items.q: Can you shoot at night or in bad weather?
items.a: Night flights - separate EASA certification, we hold it. Best night window - blue hour right after sunset with buildings lit. Before sunrise - golden hour with warm tones. Rain, fog, wind over 12 m/s - we reschedule free against the production calendar. Winter - we work to -10°C as standard, snow look is great material for premium brands and winter campaigns.

items.q: Can you turn it around fast - TVC deadline in 48-72 hours?
items.a: Yes, rush mode. Standard first cut in 5 working days. Rush: first cut in 48-72 hours, 50% surcharge on day rate. Minimum required: brief locked before shoot, storyboard signed off, locations without new permits (or we filed 7 days before the shoot). In 48 hours - that's for already-shot material or an express single-location shoot.

items.q: Do you have an English-speaking crew for foreign producers?
items.a: Yes, default. Pilot and producer speak PL, EN, UA, RU. All documents are bilingual PL/EN: contract, invoice, brief, NDA. We work with producers from London, New York, Berlin, Mumbai, Los Angeles. GDPR compliant, VAT-EU invoices, reverse-charge for foreign companies. We deliver via Frame.io, not Chinese cloud services.

ctaBanner.title: We'll build a crew
ctaBanner.lead: Send us the brief - we'll price the work, propose a storyboard, build the fleet and crew to the format and deadline. Free, no commitment.

contact.title: We can shoot your campaign
contact.lead: We reply within 24 hours on weekdays. For TVC deadlines and rush quotes - WhatsApp, 6 days a week.
